Label: N/A
Issue: Glossary terms are not defined in the document
Correction: Include a glossary section defining all terms and acronyms used in the document.

Label: Section 2.2.1
Issue: Does not specify error handling for invalid PCAP files
Correction: If an invalid PCAP file is loaded, the system shall display an error message and prompt the user to select a valid file.

Label: Section 2.2.1
Issue: Does not specify the maximum file size for PCAP files
Correction: The system shall support loading PCAP files up to 2GB in size.

Label: Section 2.2.1
Issue: Does not specify what happens if the preprocessor configuration is incomplete
Correction: If the preprocessor configuration is incomplete, the system shall disable the "Run" button and display a message indicating the missing configuration parameters.

Label: Section 2.2.1
Issue: Does not specify the default values for the preprocessor configuration
Correction: The default values for the preprocessor configuration shall be: Length scaling: 150, Value scaling: Off, Normalization: None, Autoencoder: Selected, PCA: Selected, Number of hidden layers: 4, Number of nodes in hidden layers: (256, 64, 32, 8), Loss function: MSE, Number of epochs for the training: 100, Optimizer: adam.

Label: Section 2.2.1
Issue: Does not specify the format for saving configurations
Correction: Configurations shall be saved in JSON format to ensure compatibility and ease of use.

Label: Section 2.2.1
Issue: Does not specify the behavior when multiple PCAP files are loaded
Correction: If multiple PCAP files are loaded, the system shall process them sequentially and display the results for each file in separate tabs.

Label: Section 2.2.1
Issue: Does not specify the behavior when the "Compare Runs" button is clicked without any runs available
Correction: If no runs are available, the "Compare Runs" button shall be disabled and a tooltip shall indicate that at least two runs are required for comparison.

Label: Section 2.2.1
Issue: Does not specify the behavior when the "Save" button is clicked without any changes
Correction: If no changes have been made, clicking the "Save" button shall display a message indicating that there are no changes to save.

Label: Section 2.2.1
Issue: Does not specify the behavior when the "Export As..." menu item is selected without any results
Correction: If no results are available, the "Export As..." menu item shall be disabled and a tooltip shall indicate that results must be generated before exporting.

Label: Section 2.2.1
Issue: Does not specify the behavior when the "Load Configuration" menu item is selected without any saved configurations
Correction: If no saved configurations are available, the "Load Configuration" menu item shall be disabled and a tooltip shall indicate that configurations must be saved before loading.

Label: Section 2.2.1
Issue: Does not specify the behavior when the "Save Configuration" menu item is selected without a name
Correction: If no name is provided, the "Save Configuration" menu item shall display an error message indicating that a name is required to save the configuration.

Label: Section 2.2.1
Issue: Does not specify the behavior when the "Default Configuration" menu item is selected
Correction: Selecting the "Default Configuration" menu item shall reset all configuration parameters to their default values and display a confirmation message.

Label: Section 2.2.1
Issue: Does not specify the behavior when the "Open" menu item is selected without any files
Correction: If no files are selected, the "Open" menu item shall display a message indicating that a file must be selected to proceed.

Label: Section 2.2.1
Issue: Does not specify the behavior when the "Save As..." menu item is selected without a name
Correction: If no name is provided, the "Save As..." menu item shall display an error message indicating that a name is required to save the session.

Label: Section 2.2.1
Issue: Does not specify the behavior when the "Export Configuration" menu item is selected without a name
Correction: If no name is provided, the "Export Configuration" menu item shall display an error message indicating that a name is required to export the configuration.

Label: Section 2.2.1
Issue: Does not specify the behavior when the "Run" button is clicked without a loaded PCAP file
Correction: If no PCAP file is loaded, the "Run" button shall be disabled and a tooltip shall indicate that a PCAP file must be loaded before running the preprocessor.
